name: Jersey Fruit Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon for the topping.
3. Add egg to the dry ingredients and mix with a fork until a crumbly mixture forms. Set aside.
4. Prepare the filling by peeling and slicing enough peaches, blueberries, or apples to fill a deep dish glass pie pan.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the sliced fruit with cinnamon, sugar, and cornstarch.
6. Pour the fruit mixture into the prepared pie pan.
7. Sprinkle the crumbly topping evenly over the fruit filling.
8. Scatter the chopped nuts on top of the topping.
9. Drizzle melted butter over the entire baked dish.
10. Place the dish in the preheated oven and bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until the fruit is bubbling and the topping is golden brown.
==
Low-fat/low-cal version:
Low-fat, low calorie version: Use egg beaters instead of an egg. Use low-fat margarine in place of butter. This will make enough topping to spread over 2 pies. Also, if delicious apples are used, omit the sugar and cornstarch and add 1/3 cup of water to the fruit.
